task1.answer: A book about user experience design

raw_trials.stimulus:
Welcome to the University of Jyväskylä

Thank you for taking part in this short research demo.

This prototype demonstrates baseline profiling, WebGazer-based attention capture, behavioural logging, and adaptive interface recommendation.

Prototype Check

This MVP runs in the browser and connects to a backend for saving data and generating an adaptive recommendation.

The camera starts here. After that, a short calibration step is used before gaze-based reading analysis begins.

Initializing camera...

WebGazer Calibration

Look directly at each dot and click it twice while keeping your gaze on it. This calibrates webcam-based gaze estimation so the system can generate clearer heatmaps and gaze statistics during the reading tasks.

Calibration progress: 0 / 9

Task 1

Read the paragraph carefully, then answer one question.

Reading Task

Lina is a university student who usually studies in the library after her classes. On Monday, she arrived at the library at 3:00 PM, spent one hour reading a research article, then worked on an assignment for two more hours. Before leaving, she borrowed a book about user experience design.

Stabilizing gaze capture...

response.task1_answer: A book about user experience design

raw_trials.user_answer: A book about user experience design
raw_trials.correct_answer: A book about user experience design
